ddls:
CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the image being annotated */,
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the label assigned to the cell */,
  "anchor_y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the anchor point for the bounding box */,
  "anchor_x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the anchor point for the bounding box */,
  "bb_min_y" REAL /* Minimum Y-coordinate of the bounding box */,
  "bb_min_x" REAL /* Minimum X-coordinate of the bounding box */,
  "bb_max_y" REAL /* Maximum Y-coordinate of the bounding box */,
  "bb_max_x" REAL /* Maximum X-coordinate of the bounding box */,
  "n_pixels" INTEGER /* Number of pixels within the bounding box */,
  "cell_type" TEXT /* Type of the cell (e.g., control, infected) */,
  "annotator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the annotation */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date when the annotation was created */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the annotation (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "quality_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the annotation quality is questionable */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the annotation */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the annotation was reviewed */,
  "shape" TEXT /* Shape of the cell (e.g., circular, elliptical, irregular) */,
  "size_category" TEXT /* Size category of the cell (e.g., small, medium, large) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_cell_type FOREIGN KEY ("cell_type") REFERENCES cell_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_annotator_id FOREIGN KEY ("annotator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the image file */,
  "image_name" TEXT /* Name of the image file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was uploaded */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the image */,
  "original_file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the original image file in bytes */,
  "thumbnail_path" TEXT /* File path to a thumbnail version of the image */,
  "resolution_x" INTEGER /* Horizontal resolution of the image in pixels */,
  "resolution_y" INTEGER /* Vertical resolution of the image in pixels */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data scientist, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* User's affiliation (e.g., university, hospital) */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* User's area of specialization */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cell_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cell type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the cell type (e.g., control, infected) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cell type */,
  "marker_genes" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of marker genes associated with the cell type */,
  "disease_association" TEXT /* Diseases associated with the cell type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotation_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the annotation being logged */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., created, updated, deleted) */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to perform the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotation_logs_annotation_id FOREIGN KEY ("annotation_id") REFERENCES annotations ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotation_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
